title: Kaiser
description: 6x3 min @ 120% / 3 min rest — Spencer +1 more rep

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/6. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 120%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 1/6. Target: 120% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Don't overshoot first 30s — settle in smoothly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 3:00 at 120%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 3:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/6. 120% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Set the tone. Execute with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 40%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/6. 40% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 40% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 40% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/6. You're 30% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/6. Duration: 3:00. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/6. You're building something real here. 4 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/6. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 30% complete. Rep 2/6. Fatigue is real — hold form. 120%, 95-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 40%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 35% complete. Rep 1/1. 40% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 3:00 at 40%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 40% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 41% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 3min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 41% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 41% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. 120% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 40% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 40-40% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 40%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 25 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 40% FTP × 3:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 52% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 120% for 3:00. Next up: 3:00 recovery, then 3min at 120%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 52% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 52% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 52% done. 120% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 3:00 at 40%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 40-40% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 58% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 3:00 at 40%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 3:00 at 40%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're 64% through this session. The deep work happens now, when you're tired.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 5/6. 1 to go. You've accumulated 12min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 34 minutes of work done. 16 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 34 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep work. 120% for 3:00. Then 3:00 rest. Suffer productively.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 37 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 40% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% through. This is your workout. Own it. 40% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 69% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 69% into session. 40%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last one. Your body is lying — you have more. Prove it. Then you can rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 120-120% FTP, 90-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 10 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 3:00 at 120%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 10 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. 3:00 at 120%. Then 10 minutes to contemplate your life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 120% × 3:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 81% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 18min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 43 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 81% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
